> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/durable-objects`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/durable-objects.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

durable-objects covers stateful coordination primitives on Cloudflare: per-entity Durable Objects, RPC, SQLite storage, alarms, WebSockets, hibernation. Includes wrangler config (new_sqlite_classes migrations), getByName vs newUniqueId routing, blockConcurrencyWhile for init, storage best practices, and Vitest testing patterns. Strongly retrieval-oriented toward current docs.

## Install Prerequisites

Same cloudflare/skills bundle install. Project must enable the Durable Objects binding and migration in wrangler.jsonc.

## Upstream Maintainer

Cloudflare (https://github.com/cloudflare/skills). Docs: https://developers.cloudflare.com/durable-objects/

## Comparable Alternatives

Other edge state solutions (e.g. Redis, Fauna, Supabase Realtime) or plain Workers + external DB when strong per-entity consistency at the edge is not required.

&gt; Evidence gathered from public GitHub raw files and Cloudflare docs links in skill. Not an endorsement or authority.
